heading: Omitted
label: 97 to 97d Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 97 to 97d, , , 532, set up a meat inspection fund and provided for payment for meat inspection service by the persons or organizations who were furnished such inspection on and after . These provisions ceased to be effective on , under which requires the cost of such inspection to be borne by the United States. The unobligated balance in the meat inspection fund was carried to the general fund of the Treasury by , .act July 30, 1947, ch. 356, title I, § 161 Stat. 531section 98 of this titleact June 19, 1948, ch. 543, § 162 Stat. 515July 1, 1947July 1, 1948
